name: cherrystone/principles-grid
title: Principles Grid
description: Two-column editorial grid for principles, verticals, process steps, or service areas.

heading.default: A clear framework for the page.

lede.default: Use this grid to explain the categories, beliefs, criteria, or steps that structure the page.

default.title: Operator context
default.body: Explain what makes this area important and how Cherrystone evaluates it.

default.title: Regional focus
default.body: Give readers a practical sense of geography, fit, and expected readiness.

default.title: Member judgment
default.body: Show how members contribute pattern recognition, diligence, and follow-on support.

default.title: Long-term support
default.body: Describe what happens after the first conversation, meeting, or investment.
